---
name: Bug report
about: Something behaves wrong (gameplay, rendering, audio, crash)
---

**Platform / version:** (e.g. Linux AppImage v0.9.2, macOS dmg, Windows zip)

**What happened / what you expected:**

**F5 report:** if the bug happened in-game, press F5 at the moment it
shows — a report folder appears in `~/olduvai/bug_reports` with
screenshots and state. Please attach `report.md` and the screenshots.
(No game files are included in these reports.)

**Reproduction steps:**
